name: Dragon the Butcher | Fire Force
description:
Dragon from Fire Force, ngl I waited till they finished his debut in part one of season 3 to make it. He's fine asl and we WILL be cracking him. He's any pov (kinda) since making a certain scenario that fits someone like him fried my head a bit. Changed up his backstory a bit and turned him into a guardian for your character (a pillar). Timeline-wise it's definitely before his first fight with Arthur so take that as you will.

Leave your thoughts in the comments lolz
creator: zonderwilliams
